basic_details.job_title: District Magistrate Farrukhabad Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 38 Posts
basic_details.post_name: Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: District Magistrate Farrukhabad Recruitment 2026: District Magistrate Farrukhabad has released the official notification for 38 Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Gram Panchayat Notice and Announcement Application Submission Forwarding Applications Merit List Preparation and Approval Scrutiny and Recommendation by District Committee Issuance of Appointment Letters
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Magistrate Farrukhabad Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Magistrate Farrukhabad Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the District Magistrate Farrukhabad Recruitment 2026 is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator?
faq.answer: There are a total of 38 vacancies announced for the post of Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator in the District Magistrate Farrukhabad Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type for the Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The job type for the Panchayat Sahayak / Accountant cum Data Entry Operator post is contractual, as per the official notification released by the District Magistrate Farrukhabad.

faq.question: Q5. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Magistrate Farrukhabad. The link will be provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Gram Panchayat Notice and Announcement, Application Submission, Forwarding Applications, Merit List Preparation and Approval, Scrutiny and Recommendation by District Committee, and Issuance of Appointment Letters.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Key dates include the application submission period from 22 May 2026 to 05 June 2026, and the last date to apply is 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for District Magistrate Farrukhabad?
faq.answer: The official website for District Magistrate Farrukhabad is where you can find the latest updates and download the application form. The link is provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 51 /पं०-7/स्था०-1/पंचायत सहायक-भर्ती/2026-27.
